title: Delicious Quick Ethiopian Salt Cod Dabo
description: A peppery, snappy, and quick Ethiopian dish featuring salt cod, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is inspired by traditional Ethiopian cuisine and is designed to be easy to make and packed with flavor.

ingredients.name: niter kibbeh (ethiopian clarified butter)
ingredients.notes: can be substituted with regular butter or oil

instructions: Heat the niter kibbeh in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it starts to brown and caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the chopped cilantro and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the salt cod, ground cumin, ground coriander, ground cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the fish is flaked and the spices are fragrant, about 3-4 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional chopped cilantro if desired.
